subject: ad3eddb772ccb7a93
findings: All four tasks (C.1-C.4) landed as 4 local commits on car/harness-car3, HEAD ec51e8babc75d90dacc0827ccb78cd5f4146c7b5, clean tree, nothing pushed. Verified at HEAD: Pester tests 81/81 passed 0 failed, probes 12/12 passed 0 failed, Verify-Verdict.ps1 bare exit 0 with 24/24 files verified, index regenerate-and-diff clean. Migration inventory: 24 docs/reviews/*.md git-mv'd into artifacts/reviews/ (history preserved, docs/reviews/ now empty) with 24 sibling starcar-artifact/1 JSON records, final split 19 fence-parsed / 5 fallback-parsed (plan estimated 21/3 - deviation disclosed). One execution discovery beyond the plan: 2 fenced verdicts used a pre-schema envelope grammar whose extra keys would have corrupted outcome into a multi-line value and broken the index table; caught by a new red test before the real migration ran, fixed in Migrate-Verdicts.ps1 without touching shared Envelope.psm1 (Car 2's live producer path, out of scope). CI wiring (probes floor, index-staleness gate, checkpoint fetch, ubuntu matrix leg) added with local proofs (YAML parse, scratch-copy stale-index fault injection producing exactly 1 differing line, simulated-absent-ref non-fatal fetch); live green-on-both-legs explicitly deferred to the conductor's Handback 1, not claimed here. Latency-split probe measured 4 components in isolation (pwsh start, python start, producer fixture run, hook append, all well under 200ms median) and honestly reported that they do not explain Probe 2's measured ~11-12s combined overhead - the dominant contributor remains unidentified. Probe 6 (isAsync 6/6) and spec section-9 rows 3-9 closeout landed in the plan's own review-record section, without editing the frozen spec. One minor unfixed observation, not a stop: the plan document's own historical citations to docs/reviews/*.md (predating this car's migration) were left as-is since a general path-update sweep across prior plan/review docs was judged out of C.4's explicit scope.
abstract:
Car 3 executed all four assigned tasks red-first on the approved rev-2 plan, landing 4 local commits with 81/81 tests, 12/12 probes, and Verify-Verdict exit 0 with 24 files verified at HEAD ec51e8b. One real execution-time defect (a pre-schema envelope grammar corrupting the migration's outcome field) was caught by a new test and fixed within scope before the real migration ran, and reported as a disclosed deviation rather than absorbed silently.
